headline: Coinbase, Other Crypto Stocks Surge. What’s Behind the Rally.
summary: Strategy Coinbase  and  Robinhood  stocks are, in fact, among the best performers.  Strategy, the largest corporate holder of Bitcoin, was jumping more than 7.8%—crypto exchange Coinbase rose 9.6% and trading platform Robinhood was 5.6% higher.  The price of Bitcoin surged to $71,269 early in the day, up close to 7% over the past 24 hours, according to CoinDesk data.
